title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
